name: Order Samurai Architecture Scorecard
purpose: Weighted architecture scoring contract for anti-drift, anti-sprawl, and Bushido-aligned repository governance.

categories.label: Path Authority
categories.description: All live runtime paths must resolve from one canonical path layer with no hardcoded machine-local literals.

categories.label: Runtime Coherence
categories.description: The live execution plane must remain internally coherent and machine-verifiable through a single doctor flow.

categories.label: Truth Separation
categories.description: Generated artifacts answer existence questions; hand-maintained artifacts answer policy or intent questions.

categories.label: Surface Governance
categories.description: Every major surface must have one clear role, one owner, and one discoverability contract.

categories.label: Root Hygiene
categories.description: Top-level repo entries must be classified, and new clutter must be surfaced immediately.

categories.label: Archive Isolation
categories.description: Live runtime code must not depend on archive, scratch, playground, or other exploratory surfaces.

categories.label: Lifecycle Governance
categories.description: Promotion, deprecation, and retirement of runtime assets must follow explicit policy gates.

categories.label: Documentation Parity
categories.description: Runtime contracts and human-readable architecture documents must evolve in the same change.
